content:
## Summary Notes

- Structuring content with HTML This module covers the basics of the HTML language, before looking at key areas such as document structure, links, lists, images, forms, and more.
- HTML forms Forms are a very important part of the Web — these provide much of the functionality you need for interacting with websites, e.g., registering and logging in, sending feedback, buying products, and more.
- This module gets you started with creating the client-side/front-end parts of forms.
- Guides The HTML guides help you build with HTML on the web.
- They cover topics such as forms, CORS, content preloading, and responsive images.

sources.title: HTML: HyperText Markup Language | MDN
